title: Property Consultant - Panchshil Realty - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Panchshil Realty - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Panchshil Realty has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Panchshil Realty:
Panchshil Realty is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Panchshil Realty!
